titleStmt.title: SII 38.2: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 2. (A.R. No. 2 of 1912.) TEṈKĀŚI, TENKASI TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT. On the north wall, central shrine, Vīśvanāthaśvāmin temple.

p.hi: King: Parākrama Pāṇḍya Year 31+7 siṁha 25, ba. di. 10, Friday, Anisha = irregular.

summary.p: The inscription records the gift of land in the village, Ilañjai in Teṉ-vāri-nāḍu made tax-free to the Viśvaṉātha temple in Teṉ-kāsi (Dakshiṇa-kāsi). The gift was made to the tāṉattār of the temple. It also describes the boundaries of the above land. One Kiḍārattūr-uḍaiyāṉ figures as a signatory of this record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kojaṭilavarmarāna tribhuvanaccakravattikaḷ śrīparā
kramapāṇḍyadevarkku yāṇṭu muppattoṉṟāvatiṉ Etir Eḻāvatu siṁha ñāyaṟṟu Irupattañcān tiyatiyum Aparapakṣattu Ekādaśiyum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Aniṣattu nāḷ dakṣiṇakāśi
yil Uṭaiyār viśvanāthankoyililt tāṉattārkku Uṭaiyār viśvanāthaṉukkut tevatāṉamāka viṭṭa teṉvārināṭṭu Ilañci Uḷḷiṭṭa paṟṟukkup perunāṉkelkaiyāvatu
kiḻ Elkai Āṟṟukkum Uṭaiyār tirukkuṟṟālamuṭaiya nāyaṉār tevatāṉappaṟṟukkum meṟku teṉ Elkai Iṉṉāyaṉār tevatāṉappaṟṟukku vaṭakku mel Elkai nallūrppaṟṟukkuk kiḻakku
vaṭavelkai vaṭavāṟṟukkut teṟku Āka Iṉṉāṉ kelkaikkuṭ paṭṭa paṟṟil paḻaiya tevatāṉaṅkaḷum koyilmār civitaṅkaḷum niṅkalāka Uḷḷa paṟṟil nañcey puñcey māvaṭai maravaṭai
paṭṭaṭai koṭikkaṭamai maṟṟumuḷḷa samastaprāptiyum muppattoṉṟāvatiṉ Etir Eḻāvatu kār mutalukkut tevatāṉamāka viṭṭa Aḷavukku Immariyātiyile Ivvolai piṭipāṭā
kak koṇṭu Iṉṉāḷ mutalukku candrādityavat cellak kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭi Ivvā(va)layam Uḷḷa Aḷavum tevatāṉamākak kaiyāṇṭu koṇṭu pūcaiyum
tāḻvaṟa naṭattippotavum pāṟka Ivai kaṭārattūrRead kiṭārattūrUṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu §tulyam§
Digital edition of SII 38.2 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
